# ContactProviderError.extensionInvalidateTimeout

**Case**

The extension invalidate operation timed out.

## Declaration

```swift
case extensionInvalidateTimeout
```

## Discussion

This can occur if the extension takes too long to return from [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/ContactProviderExtension/invalidate()].

## Invalidation errors

- **ContactProviderError.extensionInvalidated**: The app invalidated the extension while it was enumerating content or changes.
